info.name: Social Media Search API
info.description:
End-to-end tests for the Social Media Search feature.

Covers all 5 entity types (USER, POST, PAGE, TAG, LOCATION), pagination, validation, and auth guard.

Local dev setup:
1. docker compose up -d
2. ./mvnw spring-boot:run
3. Seed data loads automatically on startup.

Test credentials: atulk / password123

exec: pm.test('Returns at least one USER result', () => {

request.description: Search for users matching 'atul'. Expects Atul Kumar in results.

response.name: [Happy Path] Search Users

request.description: Search for posts matching 'spring'. Both seeded posts mention Spring in caption.

response.name: [Happy Path] Search Posts

request.description: Search for pages matching 'java'. Expects 'Java Community' page.

response.name: [Happy Path] Search Pages

request.description: Search for tags matching 'spring'. Expects the 'spring' tag.

response.name: [Happy Path] Search Tags

request.description: Search for locations matching 'bengaluru'. Expects the 'Bengaluru' location.

response.name: [Happy Path] Search Locations

request.description: First page with size=1. Expects totalElements=2, totalPages=2, first=true, last=false.

request.description: Second page with size=1. Should be the last page.

request.description: Blank q param should return 400 VALIDATION_ERROR with field error on 'query'.
